mapper.select: SELECT bt.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, bt.batch_id AS batchId, bt.zone_id AS zoneId, bt.worker_id AS workerId, bt.status, bt.action_status AS actionStatus, bt.started_at AS startedAt, bt.completed_at AS completedAt, bt.tote_id AS toteId, t.barcode AS toteBarcode, bt.current_location_id AS currentLocationId, bt.tote_scanned_at AS toteScannedAt, bt.location_scanned_at AS locationScannedAt, bt.tote_released_at AS toteReleasedAt FROM batch_tasks bt LEFT JOIN totes t ON bt.tote_id = t.tote_id WHERE bt.batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId}

SELECT batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, batch_id AS batchId, zone_id AS zoneId, worker_id AS workerId, status, started_at AS startedAt, completed_at AS completedAt, tote_id AS toteId FROM batch_tasks WHERE status = 'UNASSIGNED' AND zone_id = #{zoneId} ORDER BY batch_task_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, worker_id AS workerId, status, action_status AS actionStatus FROM batch_tasks WHERE worker_id = #{workerId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE batch_tasks SET worker_id = #{workerId}, status = 'IN_PROGRESS', action_status = 'SCAN_TOTE', started_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'UNASSIGNED'
UPDATE batch_tasks SET status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW(), action_status = 'COMPLETE_TASK' WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
UPDATE batch_tasks SET tote_id = #{toteId}, action_status = 'SCAN_LOCATION', tote_scanned_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
UPDATE batch_tasks SET current_location_id = #{locationId}, action_status = 'SCAN_ITEM', location_scanned_at = NOW() WHERE batch_task_id = #{batchTaskId} AND status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batch_tasks WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND status != 'COMPLETED'

SELECT bt.batch_task_id AS batchTaskId, bt.batch_id AS batchId, bt.zone_id AS zoneId, bt.worker_id AS workerId, bt.status, bt.action_status AS actionStatus, bt.started_at AS startedAt, bt.completed_at AS completedAt, bt.tote_id AS toteId, t.barcode AS toteBarcode, bt.current_location_id AS currentLocationId, bt.tote_scanned_at AS toteScannedAt, bt.location_scanned_at AS locationScannedAt, bt.tote_released_at AS toteReleasedAt FROM batch_tasks bt LEFT JOIN totes t ON bt.tote_id = t.tote_id WHERE bt.batch_task_id = #{taskId} FOR UPDATE
